material_findings: Appskoola-net is a 144584 KB private education repository and materially expands the Skoola product family; student/business data and lineage must be reviewed before any migration or consolidation decision.
FileUploadBlazor-master and WytSky.Mobile.Maui.Skoola report size 0. This is not evidence that either repository is empty or disposable; branch and history inventory is mandatory.
EventBackEnd20220102 is a 68131 KB private backend and may contain API contracts or domain features needed by the Event/CPD product family.
Sky365-knowledge-hub is public and may become a documentation/source-of-truth asset, but public visibility does not prove that its content is current or safe to treat as canonical.

The Skoola, BlazingShop, FileUploadBlazor, Net5Wasm, ZainAgenda and ForumNet families all gained additional candidate members; filename similarity remains only a family signal, not proof of duplication or canonical status.
